subject: [PATCH v5 06/21] nfsd: make nfsd4_callback_ops->prepare operation bool return

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch modifies the nfsd4_callback_ops->prepare operation to return a boolean value indicating whether callback processing should continue or not. The change is necessary because, in the case of CB_NOTIFY operations, allocation failures should cause callback processing to stop. The patch updates several functions that implement the prepare operation for different types of callbacks to return true if processing should continue and false otherwise.
